{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Gatekeeper
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Gatekeeper]] is a role [[Shadow Ark]] seeks to find to begin integrating planets into his internal system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Gatekeeper]] of [[Shadow Ark]] must have the power to defend those they protect and be a champion of his inhabitants.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
